dict.string: OmniTAK needs continuous location access to track your position, share it with team members, and provide turn-by-turn navigation even when the app is in the background.
OmniTAK needs continuous location access to track your position, share it with team members, and provide turn-by-turn navigation even when the app is in the background.
OmniTAK needs your location to show your position on the map, share it with team members, and provide navigation assistance.

OmniTAK connects to Meshtastic LoRa radios over Bluetooth so you can share position and messages with your team when there is no cellular or Wi-Fi coverage, and detects nearby drones broadcasting FAA Remote ID.
OmniTAK connects to Meshtastic LoRa radios over Bluetooth so you can share position and messages with your team when there is no cellular or Wi-Fi coverage.
OmniTAK uses the camera to scan enrollment QR codes for TAK server certificates and to attach photos to map markers.
OmniTAK lets you attach photos from your library to map markers and share them with your team.
OmniTAK saves map exports, screenshots, and captured imagery to your photo library on request.
OmniTAK discovers TAK servers advertised on your local network so you can connect to them without typing an IP address.
